overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game showing a character walking through a dark forest at night during heavy rain. The character carries a lantern to light the way while navigating through grassy paths, dense undergrowth, rocky ravines, and pine forests.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy forest trail with scattered rocks

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the forest path holding a lantern to illuminate the way through the heavy rain

entered.detail: narrow dirt trail winding through the forest
large boulders and rock formations along the path edge
tall trees forming a dense canopy overhead

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow dirt forest path at night during heavy rain, holding a lantern that casts a warm glow on the wet ground. The path is bordered by grassy slopes and scattered rocks, with tall trees forming a dense canopy overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense undergrowth transitioning to rocky terrain

events.description: path becomes increasingly rocky and overgrown with dense bushes on both sides

agents.ego_description: navigating through dense undergrowth and over rocky terrain while maintaining steady progress uphill

entered.detail: thick undergrowth and shrubs encroaching on the path
steep rocky slope visible through the trees

segments.scene_description: The character moves through increasingly dense vegetation with bushes encroaching on both sides of the path. The ground transitions from dirt to rocky gravel as the terrain begins to ascend, with steep rock faces becoming visible on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow rocky ravine with steep walls

events.description: enters a narrow rocky ravine with steep rock walls on both sides

agents.ego_description: carefully climbing up the rocky incline within the narrow ravine, using the lantern to navigate the uneven ground

entered.detail: steep moss-covered rock wall forming the left side of the ravine
steep rock face forming the right boundary of the narrow passage
large rocks scattered across the path requiring navigation

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow rocky ravine with steep moss-covered walls rising on both sides. The vegetation gives way to bare rock and scattered boulders as the path ascends sharply, with rain streaming down through the gap above.

events.description: exits the rocky ravine and re-enters the forest with tall pine trees

agents.ego_description: descending back into the forested area, moving past tall pines and ferns while continuing through the rain

entered.detail: tall straight pine trunks rising into the darkness
green ferns growing along the forest floor
large decaying log lying across the ground

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the rocky ravine back into a dense pine forest. The ground becomes softer with pine needles and ferns, and the character passes a large fallen log while continuing through the rainy night.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rainy nocturnal forest that transitions from a narrow dirt path into a steep rocky ravine before returning to a dense pine grove. It begins with the character navigating a dirt trail under a heavy canopy, where a handheld lantern casts a warm glow across wet grass and scattered rocks. As the character progresses, the vegetation grows denser and the ground shifts to rocky gravel, leading the camera upward toward steep rock faces. The scene then tightens as the path enters a narrow ravine with towering moss-covered walls and streaming rain, before finally emerging from the stone corridor back into a soft forest floor of pine needles, ferns, and fallen logs.
